description_long: This object is a rectangular computer keyboard with a predominantly white keycap set, accented by several red keys distributed across the layout. The keyboard sits on a dark brown base, which appears to be mounted on a thin, light-colored platform, possibly mimicking a wooden or laminate surface. The keycaps are sculpted and feature visible legends, with the red keys likely representing function or modifier keys. The overall build suggests a standard full-size keyboard, with a number pad section visible on one end. The surface of the keyboard and its base show a slightly rough, matte finish, and the object appears solid and robust. There are no visible cables or wireless receivers attached to the keyboard.
description: A full-size computer keyboard with white and red keycaps on a dark brown base, mounted on a light platform. The key layout and color accents are clearly visible.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the red and white keycaps, with the number pad and several red keys prominent on the left edge.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the back row of keys and the platform's edge, with the red keys on the far end.
description_view_2: Front-right view displaying the main typing area, number pad, and a cluster of red keys on the right.
description_view_3: Rear-right view focusing on the back and right side of the keyboard, with the red keys on the near edge.
